title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin presents a methodology for building an "AI Layer" harness around large codebases to improve Claude Code's effectiveness. The approach includes self-improving hooks, scoped skills, language server protocol integration, model context protocol implementation, and subagents, arguing that the harness architecture matters more than the model itself.
